summary: After an upgrade, Replica.initialize set acceptableRoot[0x00] = 1, allowing any unproven message to pass verification. Hundreds of copycats replayed the calldata with their own recipient.
attack_trace: Discover that messages with default merkle root pass acceptableRoot()
Replace recipient field, drain bridge token reserves
root_cause: Replica.initialize accidentally pre-approved the empty merkle root after the upgrade, enabling acceptableRoot(0x00) == true.
